name: davi-trino-perf
description: Optimize DAVI Trino query performance by adding a persistent connection server. Currently each davi run creates a fresh TCP+SSL+OAuth connection (~23s per query). Goal: add a /api/trino/query endpoint to davi serve that holds a warm connection, auto-start the server on first query, support proxy_user. Target: match Captain MCP speed (~3-5s per query). Includes benchmarking infrastructure.
